seoTitle: How to Integrate Typeform With Notion
metaDescription: Learn how to connect Typeform to Notion so form responses automatically create new pages in your Notion database.
intro: Manually copying form responses into Notion wastes time that could go toward actually using the data. This guide shows how to connect Typeform with Notion so new submissions automatically create entries in your Notion database, keeping your workspace up to date.

steps.heading: Connect Typeform and Notion
steps.body: Link your Typeform and Notion accounts through Typeform's integration settings to enable the connection between the two tools.

steps.heading: Select your Notion database
steps.body: Choose the specific Notion database where you want new Typeform responses to be added as pages.

steps.heading: Map fields and configure automation
steps.body: Match each form question to the corresponding property in your Notion database so responses populate correctly.

steps.heading: Test the integration
steps.body: Submit a test response and confirm it appears as expected in Notion before relying on the automation for real submissions.

faq.question: What can this integration be used for?
faq.answer: It's commonly used for lead management, project tracking, CRM organization, customer feedback, and team collaboration without manual data entry.

faq.question: Do I need to manually add each response to Notion?
faq.answer: No, once the integration is set up, new Typeform submissions automatically create pages in your chosen Notion database.

faq.question: Can I map multiple form fields to different database properties?
faq.answer: Yes, each question in your Typeform can be mapped to a corresponding property in the Notion database during setup.

faq.question: What happens if I change my Typeform questions later?
faq.answer: You may need to update the field mapping so new or changed questions correctly correspond to your Notion database properties.
